regulations.notes: What the current jntukmaterials.com site is built around. Now mostly relevant to supply/backlog-exam students, not active cohorts. Keep these pages live -- don't delete -- but stop treating them as the primary content target.
Largely winding down to backlog/supply exams as of mid-2026.
Still appears in supply/backlog result and timetable notices as of 2026, but no longer the active intake.

regulations.evaluation_scheme: Two-part practical subjects are examined as a single 3-hour, 70-mark end exam; mid-semester work evaluated separately for 30 marks; viva voce carries 20 marks within the relevant practical/project components.
regulations.honors_minor_rules: Honors registration opens in semester IV after semester III results are declared; students may take a maximum of two Honors subjects per semester from semester V onward; Honors courses may be completed in-college or via platforms like SWAYAM (minimum 12 weeks for a 3-credit course, 8 weeks for a 2-credit course).
regulations.notes: This is THE current regulation -- the build priority. Covers 1st through 4th year students as of the 2026-27 academic year.
Shows up in aggregator regulation listings alongside R23/R20/R19/R16, but no course-structure or syllabus document located yet. Watch item -- confirm scope before building against it.

subjects.name: Engineering Physics

units.title: Wave Optics
topics: Interference and intensity variation due to polarization

units.title: Crystal Structures and Magnetism
topics: Hysteresis, soft and hard magnetic materials

units.title: Quantum Mechanics and Free Electron Theory
topics: Dual nature of matter, Heisenberg's uncertainty principle
Schrodinger's wave equations, particle in a 1-D potential well
Classical and quantum free electron theory
Fermi-Dirac distribution, density of states, Fermi energy

course_outcomes: Analyze intensity variation due to polarization, interference and diffraction
Explain fundamentals of quantum mechanics and apply to one-dimensional motion
Identify semiconductor type using the Hall effect

Page describes 6 units but the gated EDD product only contains 5 files -- Unit VI may be missing from the actual download; verify before publishing the R23 version.
